modules.name: brand
modules.description: fastverk visual identity — parametric mark generator, per-platform icons, and a tectonic brandbook

modules.name: buildbarn
modules.description: Buildbarn RBE-in-a-box for EKS: Helm chart + CloudFormation + Bazel client config

modules.name: fastverk-app
modules.description: fastverk macOS app — menu-bar tray + settings + daemon-aware cred-helper, on the fvkit core

modules.name: forge
modules.description: Generic forge contract (ForgeService) + GitHub/GitLab adapters.

modules.name: fvkit
modules.description: fastverk core/runtime — fvkit platform library + fvd daemon + gRPC contract

modules.name: meridian
modules.description: Proto-driven UI framework: TS web-components + JavaFX + ratatui renderers over PanelDescriptor

modules.name: meridian_schemas
modules.description: The framework- and brand-neutral root of the meridian design language: proto contracts (PanelDescriptor + Theme), @meridian/proto-ts, and the WebRenderer seam.

modules.name: meridian_tui
modules.description: The ratatui terminal renderer of the meridian design language (native-Rust PanelDescriptor renderer).

modules.name: meridian_uiview_core
modules.description: The shared platform-neutral Rust core of the meridian design language: prost types + ProtoPaths + RequestBuilder + render helpers + the wasm bundle the web renderer consumes.

modules.name: meridian_web
modules.description: The web-components renderer of the meridian design language (reference, React-free): the web toolkit, theme binding, and the meridian_panel_bundle rule.

modules.name: pinax
modules.description: Document-to-structure extraction. Apache Beam pipeline (PDF today; DOCX next) emitting typed DocumentPart records — paragraphs, headings, tables, embedded images.

modules.name: rules_agentic_ide
modules.description: Project a normalized RDF knowledge graph into per-IDE agent configs (Claude Code / Copilot / Cursor) — skills, rulesets, MCP — via Bazel + Apache Jena.

modules.name: rules_aip
modules.description: Bazel rules for Google AIP (aip.dev) proto linting — shared api-linter toolchain + aip_proto_lint test rule + aip_proto_library deps macro.

modules.name: rules_astro
modules.description: Bazel rules for building Astro sites hermetically (astro_site / astro_dev)

modules.name: rules_autoconf
modules.description: Bazel-native autoconf-style configuration. cc_check_{header,function,symbol} + config_header — replaces autoconf+m4 with a graph of cache-aware Bazel actions.

modules.name: rules_beam
modules.description: Bazel-idiomatic Apache Beam pipeline packaging + cross-runner deployment (DirectRunner, Dataflow, Flink, Spark)

modules.name: rules_bibtex
modules.description: Bazel-idiomatic BibTeX citations (arxiv/DOI/manual) + cite-lint + research-graph aspect

modules.name: rules_bun
modules.description: Bazel rules for Bun. Hermetic 'bun test' + sandbox-escaping 'bun run' against prebuilt binaries from oven-sh/bun releases.

modules.name: rules_cc_cross
modules.description: Hermetic ARM/RISC-V/x86 cross-compiler toolchains for embedded Bazel builds (seL4, microkit, bare-metal).

modules.name: rules_chrome
modules.description: Bazel rules for Chrome for Testing. Hermetic, sha256-pinned chrome + chromedriver per platform; launchers + opt-in Playwright (py + js) macros with Bazel-managed user-data-dirs.

modules.name: rules_ci
modules.description: Bazel rules + Rust translator + Lean 4 IR for provably correct translations between GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, and Bazel rules.

modules.name: rules_ci_ir
modules.description: Bazel rules + Rust translator + Lean 4 IR for provably correct translations between GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, and Bazel rules.

modules.name: rules_cloudformation
modules.description: Bazel rules for AWS CloudFormation templates — schema-derived typed Bazel rules via rules_jsonschema, Java-based linter via rules_java + the official cloudformation-template-schema.

modules.name: rules_eslint
modules.description: Hermetic eslint runner — lint a workspace's @npm eslint binary under Bazel

modules.name: rules_fastverk
modules.description: fastverk foundation module — fastverk_* macros + the dependency BOM + shared .bazelrc

modules.name: rules_fastverk_plugin
modules.description: The portable fastverk console-plugin build macro (fastverk_plugin + rust_service_image).

modules.name: rules_github
modules.description: Bazel repository rules for GitHub-release-based content. Common substrate for rules_mdbook, rules_bun, rules_postgres, et al.

modules.name: rules_gitlab
modules.description: Bazel rules for GitLab CI: schema-pinned validate + glab-backed server-side lint.

modules.name: rules_helm
modules.description: Chart-as-a-module: build, lint, and publish Helm charts in Bazel (the Helm analog of rules_oci).

modules.name: rules_huggingface
modules.description: Bazel-idiomatic HuggingFace toolchain: hf_model / hf_upload / hf_inference_endpoint

modules.name: rules_jena
modules.description: Apache Jena toolchain implementations for rules_rdf — SPARQL engine (ARQ), SHACL validator, Turtle/N-Triples serializers, OWL reasoner. Java tools built via rules_java + Maven.

modules.name: rules_jsonschema
modules.description: Bazel rules turning JSON Schema into typed code via a per-language plugin contract (Rust, Go, Starlark)

modules.name: rules_lean
modules.description: Bazel rules for Lean 4 with Lake integration (rules_lean). Reuses Lake's mathlib cache via lake_workspace repository rule.

modules.name: rules_lora
modules.description: Bazel-native LoRA fine-tuning.

modules.name: rules_macvm
modules.description: Bazel-idiomatic, hermetic Linux VMs on macOS via Apple Virtualization.framework (vfkit), with a pluggable VMM provider seam.

modules.name: rules_markdown
modules.description: Bazel rules to compose markdown fragments into documents, with a deep-linking aspect that resolves cross-target anchors

modules.name: rules_mdbook
modules.description: Bazel rules for mdbook with mdbook-mermaid plugin support. Hermetic, sha256-pinned binaries; mdbook_book rule produces a packaged HTML tarball.

modules.name: rules_meridian
modules.description: Proto-driven UI framework: TS web-components + JavaFX + ratatui renderers over PanelDescriptor

modules.name: rules_meson
modules.description: Hermetic meson + ninja for Bazel.

modules.name: rules_nextjs
modules.description: Bazel rules for Next.js. Hermetic 'next build' with .next/ as a declared output directory.

modules.name: rules_openapi
modules.description: Bazel rules turning OpenAPI 3 specs into typed code (Rust client via progenitor for v0.1), layered on rules_jsonschema's plugin contract

modules.name: rules_podman
modules.description: Daemonless, hermetic, Bazel-idiomatic Podman: static Linux engine + mac/win client toolchain, run/build/image-load rules, and a self-managed macOS podman machine.

modules.name: rules_postgres
modules.description: Bazel rules for PostgreSQL tooling: libpg_query + raw PG source. Hermetic, sha256-pinned. Includes pg_parse_valid_test for SQL-emit CI gates.

modules.name: rules_puml
modules.description: Bazel-idiomatic PlantUML diagram rendering + composition (Java toolchain; SVG/PNG today, PDF + typed-AST planned)

modules.name: rules_rdf
modules.description: Bazel rules for RDF — toolchain types for SPARQL, SHACL validation, format conversion, and reasoning. Concrete implementations live in sibling repos like rules_jena.

modules.name: rules_readme
modules.description: README-shaped sugar over rules_markdown: templated READMEs materialized into the tree with a drift gate

modules.name: rules_runpod
modules.description: Bazel-native RunPod GPU pod orchestration. Rust CLI + TUI + typed Starlark macros (runpod_manifest / runpod_job / runpod_pod). Lifted from prime-transformer/tools/runpod-cli.

modules.name: rules_schema_org
modules.description: Sha-pinned schema.org vocabulary + grounding tables via rules_rdf / rules_jena

modules.name: rules_ssh_tui
modules.description: SSH-fronted TUI launcher: russh server + login-shell oci_image

modules.name: rules_storybook
modules.description: Bazel rules for Storybook: hermetic build, deterministic story manifest, sandbox-escaping dev runner.

modules.name: rules_systemd
modules.description: Bazel-idiomatic systemd unit provisioning: typed unit rules + providers + an aspect that emits the /etc/systemd/system layer with enable-symlinks

modules.name: rules_tap
modules.description: Public Bazel rules + prebuilt CLI for tap (test selection / impact / flake / culprit). Engine is private in fastverk/tap.

modules.name: rules_tectonic
modules.description: Bazel rules to compile LaTeX into PDFs via tectonic.

modules.name: rules_tla
modules.description: rules_tla — hermetic Bazel rules for TLA+ model checking (TLC via a pinned tla2tools.jar); tla_library + tla_check as bazel test targets

modules.name: rules_tomato
modules.description: fastverk foundation module — fastverk_* macros + the dependency BOM + shared .bazelrc

modules.name: rules_uv
modules.description: Bazel rules for uv (Astral's Python package manager)

modules.name: rules_vite
modules.description: Bazel rules for Vitest under aspect_rules_js. Hermetic js_test wrapper for vitest.

modules.name: rules_walkthrough
modules.description: Bazel rules for declarative slide-deck rendering — walkthrough.v1.Walkthrough JSON → self-contained static site (renderer JS + KaTeX + marked + per-deck data sidecars).

modules.name: rules_web
modules.description: Bazel toolchain types and rules for W3C/WHATWG web-standards specs (webidl/html/css/js) — decoupled from impl modules.

modules.name: rules_xsd
modules.description: Bazel rules for XSD: offline schema validation + XSD→RDF/OWL vocabulary generation.

modules.name: vpn
modules.description: WireGuard private-plane access: OIDC-authed gRPC provisioner, hermetic Rust client, AMI + CloudFormation. Proprietary.

modules.name: wave
modules.description: Cross-repo dependency-cascade engine + CLI — not Renovate.
